title: Consumer Kings 2024: The 3 Best Large Retail Stocks to Buy Now
text: It's certainly a good time to be a large retailer in the U.S. With the strong labor market and inflation having greatly eased, consumers are generally in excellent shape. Moreover, supply chains have greatly improved and wage pressures have gotten much less intense, pushing retailers' margins higher.

title: Best Buy: Hold For Dividend Growth As Earnings Attempt A Holiday Rebound
text: Best Buy rated neutral/hold today, agreeing with the consensus on Seeking Alpha, which also calls for a hold. Proven dividend income stability and growth play. Mixed sentiment on recession risk for 2024, offset by strength in the start of the current holiday shopping season.

title: Best Buy Canada Launches Extra Hot Deals for Boxing Day - The Biggest Shopping Day of the Year
text: VANCOUVER, British Columbia--(BUSINESS WIRE)--At Best Buy Canada Boxing Day remains the biggest shopping day of the year, and we're excited to help Canadians score the best deals of the season. Best Buy is launching our hottest Boxing Day door crasher sales Canada-wide on December 24. With deep discounts on the latest tech like TVs, coffee makers and Dyson hair, consumers are encouraged to shop early in-store and online this Boxing Day. title: KIA TAKES HOME THREE 2024 CONSUMER GUIDE AUTOMOTIVE BEST BUY AWARDS
text: The Kia EV6, Telluride and Soul won Best Buy awards in their respective segments  All-electric EV6 named a 2024 Best Buy in the compact crossover category  Telluride recognized with a Best Buy award in the midsize crossover category Tenth consecutive year Soul makes the list; marks the longest running streak for a subcompact crossover IRVINE, Calif. , Dec. 14, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Kia America took home three 2024 Consumer Guide Automotive Best Buy awards for the EV6, Telluride and Soul models.

title: KIA EV9 AND TELLURIDE WIN 2024 KELLEY BLUE BOOK BEST BUY AWARDS
text: All-new 2024 Kia EV9 wins the Best 3-Row Electric Vehicle award 2024 Kia Telluride celebrates fifth consecutive year as a Kelley Blue Book Best Buy Awards winner, taking the win in the Best Midsize SUV category IRVINE, Calif. , Dec. 12, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- The all-new 2024 Kia EV9 and the acclaimed 2024 Telluride have been named to the 2024 Kelley Blue Book Best Buy Awards list.

title: Best Buy earns upgrade to ‘Buy' on as AI supports returning demand
text: Analysts at Jefferies have upgraded Best Buy Co Inc (NYSE:BBY) to ‘Buy' from hold, citing an expected improvement in demand as the replacement cycle for consumer electronics  bought during the pandemic gets closer and rising consumer interest in artificial intelligence (AI) adds a “cherry on top.” “'24 won't be a banner year,” but investor expectations for negative mid-single digit declines in comparable sales are conservative given double-digit and high single-digit declines in 2022 and 2023, respectively, the analysts wrote ina client note.

title: My Top 10 High Yield Dividend Stocks For December 2023
